Mp4Repair C++

Mp4Repair illuminates how to fix corrupt MP4/MOV files recorded by MP4 . Causes of file corruption are various, such as power outage, system crash, etc.
You can specify a file to repair. Or you can put all damaged files in the directory (SDKv3\Examples\Legacy_VC++\CmdTools\Mp4Repair), and the files of the Mp4Repair folder will be batch fixed.

Supported Hardware

None of hardware devices are involved.

Features

  1. Repair corrupt MP4/MOV files generated by MP4 .

Workflow

  1. To search files according to the specified parameters, call: repair_file_search
  2. To fix corrupted files, call: mw_mp4_repair

Result

Mp4Repair
